verdicts.reasoning: The main text on the scan clearly reads συγγνωστοί with gamma, and the apparatus below explicitly contrasts συγγνωστοι Bb with συνγνωστοι A; this agrees with Tischendorf/Swete tradition rather than the First1K nu reading.

notes: Checked page 644 (Swete p. 627); only verse 8 was in dispute.
